details.attacks: 1 x attack (1d6 by claw or bite)
details.special: PSI: WT: All-Round Vision, Know Direction Powers: 2 28 Drakes are gargantuan, reptilian monsters that use Athas as their personal hunting grounds. Drakes comprise a very powerful, non-intelligent group of creatures on Athas. If natural instinct, cunning, and ferocity were measurable, drakes would surpass many other creatures. Innate Psionics: They are feared for their size, speed, and devastating

system.description:
The cistern fiend appears as a giant, vaguely green but translucent worm with a great mass of coiling pinkish tentacles surrounding a hideous mouth.
